candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row above the financial section, but it appears as a separate operating-expense line within the broader operating expense structure. Because the already selected COGS reference bucket includes 'Reported Operating Expense', this depreciation line appears already embedded in the selected parent bucket, so adding it separately would risk double counting.

variables.notes: Conservative no-add decision to avoid double counting against the already selected 'Reported Operating Expense' parent row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: The line is a generic operating D&A row, not explicitly tied to SG&A/admin/selling/R&D. Since no XSGA component rows were previously selected and there is no dedicated SG&A D&A row in the excerpt, there is no clear basis to add this row specifically to XSGA later.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A-specific or R&D-specific D&A row is visible above operating profit; do not allocate the generic depreciation row to XSGA_DA.
